keyEvents.text: Goal! Norway 0, France 1. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.
Patrick Berg (Norway) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Norway 0, France 2. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé following a fast break.
Goal! Norway 1, France 2. Thelo Aasgaard (Norway) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Andreas Schjelderup.
Goal! Norway 1, France 3. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Aurélien Tchouaméni.
Substitution, Norway. Morten Thorsby replaces Kristian Thorstvedt.
Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces Fredrik Bjørkan.
Penalty saved. Jørgen Strand Larsen (Norway) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France).
Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.
Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Ousmane Dembélé.
Substitution, Norway. Sondre Langås replaces Henrik Falchener.
Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal! Norway 1, France 4. Désiré Doué (France) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bradley Barcola with a cross.

Abdoulaye Seck (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Iraq. Jalal Hassan replaces Ahmed Basil because of an injury.
Goal! Senegal 2, Iraq 0. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Lamine Camara.

Substitution, Senegal. Nicolas Jackson replaces Lamine Camara.

Amir Al Ammari (Iraq) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
